testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Code Troopers transformed my approach to learning. The workshops and mentorship helped me land my first internship at a product-based company.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.quote: The hackathon experience through Code Troopers was incredible. We learned more in 48 hours than in an entire semester of theory classes.

testimonials.name: Dr. Ananya Reddy
testimonials.quote: Code Troopers sets the gold standard for student technical clubs. Their SOP-driven approach ensures every event is professionally executed.

testimonials.name: Karthik Menon
testimonials.quote: The skills I built as Workbench Head at Code Troopers directly prepared me for my career. Learn. Build. Lead. — it truly works.
